name: Sweet Risotto with Exotic Bananas
recipeIngredient: 3 Exotic ripe bananas (about 1 1/3 lb Total weight), peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle about a third of the rice in the bottom of a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle on a third of the bananas and a third of the sugar on top of the rice.
3. Continue sprinkling ingredients in thirds until all are used.
4. Pour milk and creme de cacao over the mixture, then sprinkle with cinnamon.
5. Cover and bake at 375°F (pre-heated oven) until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender, about 1 hour.
6. Serve warm; it also tastes good cold, standing in front of the refrigerator.
You can substitute skim milk or evaporated skim milk instead of whole milk. If exotic bananas aren't available, regular ones may be used. Arborio is the short-grained Italian rice traditionally used for risotto and is commonly carried at the supermarket.
